title: Thoughts and Things 3/2/24
html:
Pre-whiteout-party journal. The grey-hair anxiety: sam solum won't pick him and will rotate to kyle, which would sting. Notes the self-sabotage of not bringing sam solum around when kyle is there, traceable to her drunk first-sleepover comment about "exploring who [Kyle] was."

TL;DR

  • sam solum / kyle triangle — Yahir's anxiety locked on the rotation risk, leading to social avoidance behaviors.
  • The "first sleepover blackout comment" is the trigger event — origin of the suspicion.
  • breathwork re-invoked as the self-soothe — present-moment-only ethic.
  • Pre-party journaling pattern — Yahir uses writing to vent before events, recurs throughout 2024.

sam solum · kyle · breathwork · corvallis · social anxiety
